name: Ebenova Legal Docs MCP
description: Generate professionally drafted legal documents via AI — NDAs, freelance contracts, tenancy agreements, privacy policies, and 23 more document types across 18 jurisdictions including Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, UK, US, and Canada. Also extracts document fields from WhatsApp and email conversations.

tools.name: generate_legal_document
tools.description: Generate a professionally drafted legal document. 27 types across 18 jurisdictions.

tools.name: extract_from_conversation
tools.description: Extract structured legal document fields from a WhatsApp, email, or chat conversation.

tools.name: list_document_types
tools.description: List all 27 supported legal document types grouped by category.

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Check monthly document quota usage and remaining documents.

secrets.name: EBENOVA_API_KEY
secrets.description: Your Ebenova API key. Get a free key at https://ebenova.dev/dashboard
